title: poa minuta
intro: Poa minuta, also known as the small meadow-grass or small oat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is native to Europe and Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Poa minuta include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an expectorant to help relieve respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Poa minuta typically involve drying the leaves and stems, then making them into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
